title: Industrial Engineering Technologists and Technicians
description: Apply engineering theory and principles to problems of industrial layout or manufacturing production, usually under the direction of engineering staff. May perform time and motion studies on worker operations in a variety of industries for purposes such as establishing standard production rates or improving efficiency.

tasks.text: Test selected products at specified stages in the production process for performance characteristics or adherence to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile and evaluate statistical data to determine and maintain quality and reliability of products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Study time, motion, methods, or speed involved in maintenance, production, or other operations to establish standard production rate or improve efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read worker logs, product processing sheets, or specification sheets to verify that records adhere to quality assurance specifications.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Verify that equipment is being operated and maintained according to quality assurance standards by observing worker performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Aid in planning work assignments in accordance with worker performance, machine capacity, production schedules, or anticipated delays.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate industrial operations for compliance with permits or regulations related to the generation, storage, treatment, transportation, or disposal of hazardous materials or waste.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adhere to all applicable regulations, policies, and procedures for health, safety, and environmental compliance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze, estimate, or report production costs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assist engineers in developing, building, or testing prototypes or new products, processes, or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calibrate or adjust equipment to ensure quality production, using tools such as calipers, micrometers, height gauges, protractors, or ring gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct statistical studies to analyze or compare production costs for sustainable and nonsustainable designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate equipment purchases, installations, or transfers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create or interpret engineering drawings, schematic diagrams, formulas, or blueprints for management or engineering staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design plant layouts or production facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop manufacturing infrastructure to integrate or deploy new manufacturing processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement programs to address problems related to production, materials, safety, or quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop production, inventory, or quality assurance programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop sustainable manufacturing technologies to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, minimize raw material use, replace toxic materials with non-toxic materials, replace non-renewable materials with renewable materials, or reduce waste.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify opportunities for improvements in quality, cost, or efficiency of automation equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and adjust production processes or equipment for quality and productivity.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Oversee equipment start-up, characterization, qualification, or release.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee or inspect production processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare layouts, drawings, or sketches of machinery or equipment, such as shop tooling, scale layouts, or new equipment design, using drafting equipment or computer-aided design (CAD) software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare production documents, such as standard operating procedures, manufacturing batch records, inventory reports, or productivity reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Provide advice or training to other technicians.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend corrective or preventive actions to assure or improve product quality or reliability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select cleaning materials, tools, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select material quantities or processing methods needed to achieve efficient production.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and operate production equipment in accordance with current good manufacturing practices and standard operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
